name: liblwp-protocol-socks-perl
title: liblwp-protocol-socks-perl
description:
SOCKS proxy support for LWP
LWP::Protocol::socks implements the SOCKS protocol for Perl WWW library. It
provides the essential hooks into the LWP system to add the capability to
setup a LWP::UserAgent to use a SOCKS proxy the same way as already possible
for a HTTP proxy.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use liblwp-protocol-socks-perl because SOCKS proxy support for LWP.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use liblwp-protocol-socks-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair liblwp-protocol-socks-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `liblwp-protocol-socks-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
